title: Biome Golems
description: Adds biome variants to Iron Golems
body:
This mod adds biome variants to Iron Golems. These variants also replace the poppies that the golems drop with whichever flower the variant uses.

**VARIANTS**
- White Tulip (Snowy Biomes)
- Vines (Jungles)
- Sunflower (Sunflower Plains)
- Pink Tulip (Deserts)
- Orange Tulip (Savannas)
- Lily of the Valley (Unused)
- Cornflower (Unused)
- Blue Orchid (Swamps)
- Allium (Meadows)
- Dandelion (Taigas)
- Dead Bush (Badlands)
- Eyeblossom (Pale Garden)
- Poppy (Everywhere else)
![Iron Golem Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zpha6eC6/images/7016daa38b9f55ca365e9b5dd11bbc0c98c53eca.png)

[Want Fresh Animations support?](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/biome-golems-fresh-animations)
